Metadata.title: Shika — Personal status
Metadata.description: A single-person status page with separate owner and public views.

Auth.signInFailed: GitHub sign-in could not be started. Please try again.

description.available: Everything shared on this page is currently available.
description.limited: Some parts of the current state are available with limits.
description.degraded: The current state is available, but not at its usual capacity.
description.unavailable: The current state is unavailable right now.
description.unknown: There is no current public report to confirm the overall state.

coverage.complete: Every published item has a current report.
coverage.partial: Some published items do not have a current report.
coverage.none: No published item has a current report.

PublicStatus.noPublicChange: No public change has been recorded yet.
PublicStatus.reportWithdrawn: The latest public report was withdrawn.
PublicStatus.reportRedacted: The latest public report was redacted.
PublicStatus.reportUnavailable: No current public report is available.
PublicStatus.activeIncidentCount: {count, plural, =0 {No active incidents} =1 {# active incident} other {# active incidents}}
PublicStatus.noActiveIncidents: There is no public incident in progress.
PublicStatus.componentCount: {count, plural, =0 {No status components} =1 {# status component} other {# status components}}
PublicStatus.noComponents: No public status component has been published. This does not mean everything is available.
PublicStatus.maintenanceCount: {count, plural, =0 {No maintenance windows} =1 {# maintenance window} other {# maintenance windows}}
PublicStatus.noMaintenance: There is no public maintenance in progress or scheduled.

History.historyChangedDescription: A privacy update invalidated this history page. Start again from the latest public records.
History.title: Public history
History.description: A chronological record of status reports, incidents, and planned maintenance shared publicly by the owner.
History.pageCount: {count, plural, =0 {No records on this page} =1 {# record on this page} other {# records on this page}}
History.empty: No public history has been published.

Incident.redactedDescription: This public record was redacted. No incident details are available.
Incident.redactedTimeline: The public timeline retains only a privacy-safe redaction record.
Incident.noLatestSummary: No public summary was provided for the latest update.
Incident.updateCount: {count, plural, =0 {No public updates} =1 {# public update} other {# public updates}}
Incident.noUpdateSummary: No public summary was provided for this update.

AuthPages.signInDescription: Sign in with the one GitHub account configured to operate this status page.
AuthPages.errorDescription: The request was cancelled, failed, or could not be authorized.

PublicError.title: Current status cannot be confirmed
PublicError.description: The public status data is temporarily unavailable. No current condition should be inferred from this page.

AdminError.title: The owner console could not be loaded
AdminError.description: No operation was confirmed. Retry the request when you are ready.

OwnerTimeline.label: Owner timeline
OwnerTimeline.pageCount: {count, plural, =0 {No owner records on this page} =1 {# owner record on this page} other {# owner records on this page}}
OwnerTimeline.empty: No owner activity has been recorded.

AdminFeedback.error: Review the submitted values and try again.
AdminFeedback.reauth: Your owner session is no longer valid.
AdminFeedback.reauthLink: Sign in again in a new tab
AdminFeedback.reauthSuffix: , then return to this tab and submit the preserved form again.
AdminFeedback.conflict: The data changed while this form was open.
AdminFeedback.conflictWarning: Do not refresh this tab or your draft may be lost.
AdminFeedback.conflictLink: Open the latest admin data in a new tab
AdminFeedback.conflictSuffix: and re-enter the reviewed change there. Keep this tab only as a draft reference; its version guards are intentionally stale.

pane.timelineDescription: Review every owner status report, incident update, and maintenance event in one stable history, including records that were never public.
pane.statusDescription: Choose an owner-only report or an explicit public update. The two destinations never share an implicit default.
pane.statusEmptyCopy: Create an active component before reporting a condition. It can remain owner-only or be published with an explicit starting report.
pane.incidentNewDescription: Open an owner record, then decide explicitly whether this first update is also published.
pane.incidentEmptyHeading: No component available for an incident
pane.incidentEmptyCopy: An incident must affect at least one active component. Create that component first, then return here to open the incident.
pane.incidentDescription: Only operations valid for the selected incident are available. Private notes and public updates remain separate.
pane.maintenanceNewDescription: Schedule one UTC-backed maintenance window and choose its exposure deliberately.
pane.maintenanceEmptyCopy: A maintenance window must belong to an active component. Create that component first, then return here to schedule the window.
pane.maintenanceDescription: Reschedule or move this window through its valid lifecycle without mixing it with other maintenance records.
pane.componentNewDescription: Create an owner-only status item or explicitly publish it with a public snapshot and starting report.
pane.componentDescription: The owner draft and exact visitor snapshot are shown separately. Publishing never copies unseen private history.
pane.settingsDescription: Keep owner notes separate from the exact title and summary shown to visitors. Only an explicit publish changes public pages.
pane.overviewDescription: Compare the private owner projection with the exact public projection, then choose one operation from the left.

notice.componentRedacted: Component and dependant public history redacted.
notice.componentSuppressed: Component and dependant public history suppressed.
notice.componentWithdrawn: Component withdrawn from current public status.

reportStatus.privateComponent: This component is owner-only, so this report cannot be public yet.
reportStatus.visitorUpdateDescription: This summary is published with the selected condition.

createComponent.publicSnapshotDescription: These fields are the exact component details visitors will see.
createComponent.privateSnapshotHelp: Public snapshot fields stay out of the form while this component is private. You can prepare and publish them later from the component workspace.
createComponent.startingReportDescription: Optional for an owner-only component and required when publishing the component now.
createComponent.confirmation: I reviewed the visitor snapshot and starting report and want to publish both together.

componentMetadata.publicDraftDescription: Saving this draft does not change what visitors see. Publishing is a separate reviewed action.
componentMetadata.keepPublicDraft: Keep a public metadata draft for a later publication.
componentMetadata.noVisitorMetadata: This status item currently has no visitor-visible metadata.

componentLifecycle.archiveDescription: Archiving removes this item from current owner coverage. Published history remains available.
componentLifecycle.visitorImpactCurrent: Visitor impact: the current public metadata{status, select, true { and status} other {}} will close in the same transaction. Historical public snapshots remain.
componentLifecycle.visitorImpactNone: Visitor impact: none. This item has no current public projection.
componentLifecycle.blockersDescription: This preview helps review the impact. The command checks the latest incident and maintenance state again before committing.
componentLifecycle.confirmation: I reviewed the current public impact and confirmed that no unresolved incident or active maintenance should reference this item.
componentLifecycle.restoreDescription: Unarchiving restores this item only to the owner console. It remains private until a metadata draft and a new starting report are explicitly published together.

incident.publicRequirement: A public incident requires at least one affected component and every selected component must already be public. This incident can still be saved for the owner only.
incident.visitorIncidentDescription: These fields are the exact incident details visitors will see.
incident.selectAffected: Select at least one active status item before opening an incident.
incident.publicLifecycle: Lifecycle changes to a public incident are published so the visitor record cannot silently diverge.
incident.ownerOnlyUpdate: This incident is owner-only. Updates remain private until an explicit incident publication workflow is available.
incident.visitorUpdateDescription: This summary is appended to the public incident timeline.
incident.recoveryDescription: Choose explicitly whether each affected item keeps its current status or receives a recovery report. Status publication is independent from the incident update.
incident.lifecycleConfirmation: I reviewed every affected component outcome and understand this changes the incident lifecycle for visitors.
incident.redactDescription: Redaction replaces public history with tombstones.
incident.suppressDescription: Suppression removes it from Shika public surfaces.
incident.closureConfirmation: I reviewed this {action} action and understand it changes or removes the public incident projection; copies outside Shika cannot be recalled.
incident.metadataAffectedDescription: Private revisions may differ from the visitor snapshot. Public lifecycle updates continue from the last published component set.
incident.selectOneAffected: Select at least one affected status item.
incident.metadataPublishRequirement: Publishing requires at least one selected component, and every selected component must be active and currently public. This revision can still be saved for the owner only.
incident.visitorSnapshotDescription: Review the exact title, severity, and summary before publishing.

maintenance.privateComponent: Maintenance for this component remains owner-only until the component has a public snapshot.
maintenance.visitorNoticeDescription: Review the exact title and summary before publishing this window.
maintenance.publicLifecycle: Lifecycle changes to public maintenance are published so the visitor record cannot silently diverge.
maintenance.ownerOnlyUpdate: This window is owner-only. Updates remain private until it is explicitly published from the maintenance workspace.
maintenance.noScriptReschedule: Fill these only when the selected operation is reschedule. Without JavaScript, times are interpreted as UTC.
maintenance.visitorUpdateDescription: This summary is appended to the public maintenance timeline.
maintenance.recoveryDescription: Choose explicitly whether each item keeps its current status or receives a recovery report.
maintenance.startDescription: Choose explicitly whether starting this window also changes each item status.
maintenance.lifecycleConfirmation: I reviewed the maintenance window and every component outcome, and understand this changes its lifecycle for visitors.
maintenance.redactDescription: Redaction replaces public history with tombstones.
maintenance.suppressDescription: Suppression removes it from Shika public surfaces.
maintenance.closureConfirmation: I reviewed this {action} action and understand it changes or removes the public maintenance projection; copies outside Shika cannot be recalled.

publishComponent.startingReportDescription: This report becomes the visitor condition in the same transaction as the metadata draft. Earlier private reports stay private.
publishComponent.confirmation: I reviewed the exact metadata and starting report that will become public. No earlier private report will be published.

publishMaintenance.confirmation: I reviewed this exact title, schedule, phase, and status-item set. Only this new snapshot will become public; earlier owner-only events remain private.
publishMaintenance.requirePublicComponents: Every affected status item must be public before this maintenance window can be published.

siteProfile.privateSourceDescription: These values stay in the owner console. Saving never changes the visitor page by itself.
siteProfile.timezoneDescription: Shika currently uses one fixed timezone for owner and visitor timestamps.
siteProfile.publicDraftDescription: Prepare visitor-safe copy here, then review and publish it from the Publish task.
siteProfile.keepDraft: Keep a public draft. Removing the draft does not withdraw an already published snapshot.
siteProfile.createDraftFirst: Create a visitor-safe public draft before publishing the site profile.
siteProfile.alreadyCurrent: This exact profile revision is already the visitor snapshot. Edit and save a new revision before publishing another change.
siteProfile.currentlyPrivate: The site profile is currently private.
siteProfile.publishConfirmation: I reviewed the candidate above. Only this visitor-safe snapshot will be published; owner notes and private copy remain private.
siteProfile.chooseClosure: Choose a public profile closure action
siteProfile.terminalSuppression: Suppression is terminal. No further public profile action is available.
siteProfile.noHistory: The site profile has no public history to close.
siteProfile.noVisibleProfile: No profile is currently visible. The selected action applies to retained publication history.
siteProfile.closureConfirmation: I reviewed the selected {action} action. I understand copies already saved outside Shika cannot be recalled.

action.withdrawDescription: Remove the current profile from visitor pages while retaining its publication history.
action.redactDescription: Close every retained public profile snapshot with a privacy redaction.
action.suppressDescription: Remove the profile and its retained snapshots from Shika public surfaces.

statusClosure.withdrawDescription: Remove the current public report while retaining public history.
statusClosure.redactDescription: Replace this report's public history with a generic tombstone.
statusClosure.suppressDescription: Remove this report from every Shika public surface.
statusClosure.confirmation: I reviewed this {action} action and understand it changes or removes the public status projection; copies outside Shika cannot be recalled.

componentPrivacy.choose: Choose a public component closure action
componentPrivacy.withdrawDescription: Remove the current component from public status while retaining public history.
componentPrivacy.redactDescription: Replace every affected component, incident, and maintenance snapshot with generic tombstones.
componentPrivacy.suppressDescription: Remove the component, dependant records, and their tombstones from every Shika public surface.

unavailable.no_public_history: There is no public history left for this action.
unavailable.no_current_projection: The component is not currently public.
unavailable.historical_dependants: Incident or maintenance history still names this component. Use redaction or suppression to close it atomically.
unavailable.already_redacted: Redacted history can only be upgraded to suppression.

componentPrivacy.relatedComponents: Other components whose dependency versions change
componentPrivacy.relatedComponentMeta: {name} · {count, plural, =1 {# dependant record} other {# dependant records}}
componentPrivacy.externalCopies: I understand Shika cannot recall copies already saved by browsers, archives, or third parties.
componentPrivacy.redactButton: {count, plural, =0 {Redact component} =1 {Redact component and # dependant record} other {Redact component and # dependant records}}
componentPrivacy.suppressButton: {count, plural, =0 {Suppress component} =1 {Suppress component and # dependant record} other {Suppress component and # dependant records}}
componentPrivacy.terminal: This component has reached a terminal public state. Its owner history remains available here for audit, but no further public closure is valid.
